(*' 1000000000000 1000000000000)
;;=> 1000000000000000000000000N
(*' 1000000 1000000)
;;=> 1000000000000
(+' 1 2)
;;=> 3
(-' 10 3)
;;=> 7
(inc' 41)
;;=> 42
(dec' 42)
;;=> 41
(reduce *' (range 1 25))
;;=> 620448401733239439360000N
(*' -1000000000000 1000000000000)
;;=> -1000000000000000000000000N
(+' 9223372036854775807 1)
;;=> 9223372036854775808N
(dec' -9223372036854775808)
;;=> -9223372036854775809N
